assessor_raw:
BASELINE ASSESSMENT — real_world_framing_007 (Run 3)

The model performance (F1 = 0.72) is not the issue. The deployment design has two gaps: (1) a documented behavioral feedback loop from alert-triggered mode switching that creates prediction-outcome coupling not present in training data, and (2) a threshold not calibrated for passenger trust consequences. Both issues require empirical measurement before full deployment.

Verdict: Controlled A/B test across stop clusters required before full-scale deployment.
